---
title: "Peer Review Gesamtbericht"
subtitle: "Vollständiger Bericht mit Selbstbewertung und Fremdbewertungen"
author: "Leading Peer"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d. %B %Y')`"

output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    df_print: kable
    fig_caption: true
geometry: margin=0.8in
fontsize: 10pt
documentclass: article
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, 
  message = FALSE, 
  warning = FALSE, 
  fig.width = 7, 
  fig.height = 5,
  fig.align = 'center'
)

library(knitr)

# Load lab info
if (file.exists("labinfo.csv")) {
  labinfo <- read.csv("labinfo.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
} else {
  labinfo <- data.frame()
}

# Load Selbstbewertung data
if (file.exists("selbst_statistics.csv")) {
  selbst_stats <- read.csv("selbst_statistics.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
} else {
  selbst_stats <- data.frame()
}

if (file.exists("selbst_groups.csv")) {
  selbst_groups <- read.csv("selbst_groups.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
} else {
  selbst_groups <- data.frame()
}

if (file.exists("selbst_texts.csv")) {
  selbst_texts <- read.csv("selbst_texts.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
} else {
  selbst_texts <- data.frame()
}

# Load Fremdbewertung data
if (file.exists("fremd_all.csv")) {
  fremd_all <- read.csv("fremd_all.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
} else {
  fremd_all <- data.frame()
}

# Load report metadata
if (file.exists("report_meta.csv")) {
  report_meta <- read.csv("report_meta.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
} else {
  report_meta <- data.frame(teilnehmende = "", ort = "", datum = "")
}

# Load SWOT data
if (file.exists("swot_data.csv")) {
  swot_data <- read.csv("swot_data.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
} else {
  swot_data <- data.frame(strengths = "", weaknesses = "", opportunities = "", threats = "")
}

# Load co-peers
if (file.exists("co_peers.csv")) {
  co_peers <- read.csv("co_peers.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
} else {
  co_peers <- data.frame()
}

# Load text files
if (file.exists("best_practices.txt")) {
  best_practices <- readLines("best_practices.txt", warn = FALSE)
  best_practices <- paste(best_practices, collapse = "\n")
} else {
  best_practices <- ""
}

if (file.exists("final_remarks.txt")) {
  final_remarks <- readLines("final_remarks.txt", warn = FALSE)
  final_remarks <- paste(final_remarks, collapse = "\n")
} else {
  final_remarks <- ""
}

# Table 1: Statistics
create_statistics_table <- function(section_name) {
  stats <- subset(selbst_stats, Section == section_name)
  
  if (nrow(stats) > 0 && all(c("Frage", "Statistik") %in% names(stats))) {
    output <- data.frame(
      Nr = 1:nrow(stats),
      Frage = stats$Frage,
      Statistik = stats$Statistik,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    kable(
      output,
      col.names = c("Nr.", "Frage", "Selbstbewertung - Verteilung"),
      align = c("c", "l", "l")
    )
  } else {
    cat("\n*Keine Statistik vorhanden.*\n\n")
  }
}

# Table 2: Group averages
create_groups_table <- function(section_name) {
  groups <- subset(selbst_groups, Section == section_name)
  
  if (nrow(groups) > 0 && all(c("Frage", "Berufsgruppen") %in% names(groups))) {
    output <- data.frame(
      Nr = 1:nrow(groups),
      Frage = groups$Frage,
      Berufsgruppen = groups$Berufsgruppen,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    kable(
      output,
      col.names = c("Nr.", "Frage", "Durchschnitt nach Berufsgruppe"),
      align = c("c", "l", "l")
    )
  } else {
    cat("\n*Keine Berufsgruppen-Daten vorhanden.*\n\n")
  }
}

# Table 3: Text responses
create_text_table <- function(section_name) {
  texts <- subset(selbst_texts, Section == section_name)
  
  if (nrow(texts) > 0 && all(c("Frage", "Textantworten") %in% names(texts))) {
    output <- data.frame(
      Nr = 1:nrow(texts),
      Frage = texts$Frage,
      Textantworten = texts$Textantworten,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    kable(
      output,
      col.names = c("Nr.", "Frage", "Selbstbewertung - Textantworten"),
      align = c("c", "l", "l")
    )
  } else {
    cat("\n*Keine Textantworten vorhanden.*\n\n")
  }
}

# Table 4: Fremdbewertung (with reviewer info)
create_fremd_table <- function(section_name) {
  fremd <- subset(fremd_all, Section == section_name)
  
  if (nrow(fremd) > 0 && all(c("Frage", "Antwort", "Begründung", "Reviewer") %in% names(fremd))) {
    output <- data.frame(
      Nr = 1:nrow(fremd),
      Frage = fremd$Frage,
      Fremdbewertung = fremd$Antwort,
      Kommentar = fremd$Begründung,
      Reviewer = fremd$Reviewer,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    kable(
      output,
      col.names = c("Nr.", "Frage", "Fremdbewertung", "Kommentar", "Reviewer"),
      align = c("c", "l", "c", "l", "l")
    )
  } else {
    cat("\n*Keine Fremdbewertung vorhanden.*\n\n")
  }
}
